data.body:
Subtasks:
1. Polish split view text areas — mono label top, serif heading, sans body, CTA button, y-centered (ref: Shinkei Systems)
2. Nav bar expands on scroll-up
3. Add viewport padding (1/8–1/6 vh) between hero→section 2, section 3→video
4. Bigger size difference between headers and body text globally
5. Statement section — large bold text
6. Footer — arch photo + hero node overlay as background, low opacity, conclusion to beginning
